ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sampling_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sampling site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sampling site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sampling site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "water_body_type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., lake, river, ocean) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email contact for the site */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone contact for the site */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the site is currently active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the water_samples table */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
